mapper.sql: p.id AS id, CASE WHEN p.deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE p.body END AS body, u.id AS author_id, u.display_name AS author_display_name, u.avatar_url AS author_avatar_url, p.created_at AS created_at, p.updated_at AS updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.id AND (c.deleted_at IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM comments child WHERE child.parent_comment_id = c.id)) ) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.post_id = p.id) AS like_count, (p.user_id = #{currentUserId}) AS is_mine, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM follows f WHERE f.follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND f.followee_id = p.user_id) AS is_following, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM likes l WHERE l.post_id = p.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId}) AS is_liked, (p.deleted_at IS NOT NULL) AS is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND (p.deleted_at IS NULL OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM comments c2 WHERE c2.post_id = p.id))
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET body = #{body}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET deleted_at = now() WHERE id = #{postId}
